lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Hello there. Do you have any questions about Leagues?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a League?

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Leagues are time-limited challenges that provide a unique twist on the world you know and love.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: With each League, you start afresh, with a limited amount of time to progress through the League.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A fresh start? Why would I want that?

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Glory, rewards, and the chance to do things in a different way!

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: First up, the glory. Within a League, you can earn League Points by completing various tasks.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: The more points you have, the better League Rank you will be given.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Each League Rank will unlock a trophy for you. These trophies can be used to show off your accomplishments.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: If that doesn't interest you, perhaps another reward might be more appealing? League Points can be used to buy things from the Leagues Reward Shop.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: You can keep these purchases for yourself or sell them on to others!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And if glory and rewards don't interest me?

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Every League has unique rules and features. It's a very different world from the one you're used to.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: For one thing, within the Leagues, you can unlock powerful artefacts known as Relics which completely change the way you progress.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: So even if glory and rewards aren't your thing, you'll still find Leagues to be a whole lot of fun!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see, thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: My pleasure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there currently a League running?

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Yes! The current League is Leagues IV: Trailblazer Reloaded.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Within this League you are restricted to certain regions around Gielinor - although you'll get to choose which ones.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: You can also collect powerful artefacts known as Relics. Each one provides a different buff to your League experience.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: I heard there's one that lets you note items wherever you want, and one that makes shops free!

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: One other thing. You must participate as an Iron Man. This means you stand alone and cannot trade with other participants.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting. Maybe I should take part!

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: I'd highly recommend it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I purchase some League rewards?

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Certainly! I have a number of unique rewards which you might be interested in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can we talk about League Trophies?

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Of course! What would you like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do League Trophies work?

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: League Trophies are a representation of how well you did in a specific League. Performance is judged on the number of League Points you earned.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: There are seven tiers of League Trophy: Bronze, Iron, Steel, Mithril, Adamant, Rune and Dragon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the League Point cut-offs for the League Trophies?

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Which League do you want to know about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Leagues I: Twisted.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: The Bronze Trophy cut-off is 10 points. The Iron Trophy cut-off is 80 points. The Steel Trophy cut-off is 510 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: The Mithril Trophy cut-off is 1,770 points. The Adamant Trophy cut-off is 5,270 points. The Rune Trophy cut-off is 10,820 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Finally, the Dragon Trophy cut-off is 20,830 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: You earned [number] League Points in Leagues I: Twisted. Sadly, that means you are not eligible for any Twisted Trophies.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: You earned [number] League Points in Leagues I: Twisted. That makes you eligible for the [trophy] and all Twisted Trophies under it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Leagues II: Trailblazer.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: The Bronze Trophy cut-off is 100 points. The Iron Trophy cut-off is 510 points. The Steel Trophy cut-off is 2,000 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: The Mithril Trophy cut-off is 6,480 points. The Adamant Trophy cut-off is 18,720 points. The Rune Trophy cut-off is 35,680 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Finally, the Dragon Trophy cut-off is 56,310 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: You earned [number] League Points in Leagues II: Trailblazer. Sadly, that means you are not eligible for any Trailblazer Trophies.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: You earned [number] League Points in Leagues II: Trailblazer. That makes you eligible for the [trophy] and all Trailblazer Trophies under it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Leagues III: Shattered Relics.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: The Bronze Trophy cut-off is 100 points. The Iron Trophy cut-off is 480 points. The Steel Trophy cut-off is 1,660 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: The Mithril Trophy cut-off is 5,475 points. The Adamant Trophy cut-off is 15,575 points. The Rune Trophy cut-off is 31,980 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Finally, the Dragon Trophy cut-off is 52,545 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: You earned [number] League Points in Leagues III: Shattered Relics. Sadly, that means you are not eligible for any Shattered Relics Trophies.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: You earned [number] League Points in Leagues III: Shattered Relics. That makes you eligible for the [trophy] and all Shattered Relics Trophies under it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Leagues IV: Trailblazer Reloaded.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: The Bronze Trophy cut-off is 2,500 points. The Iron Trophy cut-off is 5,000 points. The Steel Trophy cut- off is 10,000 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: The Mithril Trophy cut-off is 18,000 points. The Adamant Trophy cut-off is 28,000 points. The Rune Trophy cut-off is 42,000 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Finally, the Dragon Trophy cut-off is 56,000 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: You earned [number] League Points in Leagues IV: Trailblazer Reloaded. Sadly, that means you are not eligible for any Trailblazer Trophies.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: You earned [number] League Points in Leagues IV: Trailblazer Reloaded. That makes you eligible for the [trophy] and all Trailblazer Reloaded Trophies under it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, let's talk about something else.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Very well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: All the best.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm good, thanks.

lines.speaker: Leagues Assistant
lines.text: Very well. I'll be here if you ever need to know anything more.
